key.name: recent-files
key.description: Absolute paths of recently opened 3D models.

key.name: session-files
key.description: Absolute paths of models open in the last closed window session.

key.name: restore-session
key.description: When enabled, reopen the last session’s model tabs on startup (unless a file is passed on the command line).

key.name: split-compare-sash-ratio
key.description: Fraction of window width used by the primary tab view when Split Compare is enabled (0.45–0.80).

key.name: split-compare-enabled
key.description: Remember whether Split Compare was on, and reopen it after startup when models are available.

key.name: split-compare-pinned
key.description: Whether the secondary Split Compare model was pinned.

key.name: split-compare-pin-path
key.description: Absolute path of the pinned secondary model. Cleared automatically if the file is missing on restore.

key.name: nav-zoom-to-cursor
key.description: Zoom toward the point under the pointer instead of the view center.

key.name: nav-orbit-around-cursor
key.description: Orbit around the point under the pointer on the focal plane. Off keeps the classic view-center orbit. Hold Alt to temporarily toggle.

key.name: nav-touchpad-orbit
key.description: When enabled, touchpad two-finger scroll orbits; otherwise it zooms like a mouse wheel.

key.name: nav-mmb-click-pivot
key.description: A middle-mouse click without drag recenters the orbit target under the cursor.
